heading_content_part: LoLegacyPrivacy PolicyThe LoLegacy mobile application is built by Quoc Hoang Nguyen as an Ad Supported App and it generates revenue through displaying advertisements.This page informs LoLegacy users of policies regarding the collection, use and disclosure of personal data when using the App

By using LoLegacy, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance to this policy. The data collection is used to improve the App and I will not use or share your information with anyone unless otherwise stated in this Privacy Policy.The terms used in this Privacy Policy have the same meanings as in our Terms and Conditions except where described in this Privacy Policy.
